patch.value: Auto daily release silently skips releasable commits when CHANGELOG [Unreleased] is empty

Root cause why crash fixes (PR #39/#40, Sentry PM-CLI-R/S/T) stayed unreleased on 2026.5.18 for days: run-release-pipeline.mjs reports skipped:true reason:changelog_unreleased_empty when [Unreleased] has no body, even though there are src-touching commits since the last tag. The skip is by design but produces a silent no-op (25s green run) so maintainers do not notice fixes are stranded. Fix: when commits since last release tag touch src/ but [Unreleased] is empty, emit a loud warning (and optionally auto-generate entries from conventional commits via generate-release-notes.mjs) instead of a silent success. Immediate mitigation applied: populated CHANGELOG [Unreleased] so the next auto-release ships the backlog.

author: codex-release-ux
message: Start release skip UX fix: prevent silent green no-op when releasable source commits exist but CHANGELOG [Unreleased] is empty; using specialized sub-agents for release-flow and tests/docs context.

value.author: codex-release-ux
value.text: Start: Claimed by codex-release-ux. Scope is the auto daily release skip behavior. Duplicate check: pm search/open review found existing canonical item pm-ot8r under pm-rnpb, so I am reusing it instead of creating a new item. Planned lanes: release script implementation, focused regression tests, docs/changelog parity, manual temp-project/release dry-run validation, telemetry/Sentry/GitHub closeout.

value.author: release-test-docs-subagent
value.text: Start: release-test/docs read-only inspection for release pipeline behavior. Scope: changelog empty skip, dry-run behavior, release gates, docs/RELEASING.md, existing tests/docs only; no file edits planned.

value.author: privacy-observability-subagent
value.text: Privacy/observability review start: inspecting tracked release, telemetry, and Sentry docs/scripts for accidental private host/key/token leaks; repository files will remain read-only. I will also identify current post-implementation telemetry/Sentry verification commands.

value.author: release-flow-subagent
value.text: release-flow-subagent start: read-only inspection of scripts/release/run-release-pipeline.mjs and changelog/release-note helpers; goal is to identify changelog_unreleased_empty skip path, commit inspection since last tag, and minimal loud/visible implementation. No file edits planned.

value.author: release-test-docs-subagent
value.text: Final findings (release-test/docs, read-only): Existing coverage: tests/integration/release-automation-contract.spec.ts covers package release scripts, auto-release workflow strings, changelog promotion, help output, and delegated verify-published checks; tests/integration/ci-workflow-contract.spec.ts covers release/auto-release workflow gate wiring; tests/integration/release-readiness-runtime.spec.ts only checks release script/path markers including changelog_unreleased_empty. Gap: no behavioral regression proves run-release-pipeline treats release-relevant commits + empty CHANGELOG [Unreleased] as loud/actionable instead of quiet ok skipped:true reason=changelog_unreleased_empty. Smallest test update: add focused case in tests/integration/release-automation-contract.spec.ts, preferably against an extracted/exported pure classifier from scripts/release/run-release-pipeline.mjs so it does not need a temp git repo or full gates. Assert src/docs release-relevant files + nonzero commits + empty unreleased returns the new warning/failure/actionable reason, while .agents/pm-only changes still skip cleanly. Keep existing changelog promotion test unchanged. Docs/changelog: docs/RELEASING.md Automated Daily Driver should explicitly say release-relevant commits require a populated [Unreleased] entry and empty [Unreleased] is an actionable release-prep failure/warning, not a silent success; CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] should get one concise Changed/Fixed entry for pm-ot8r when implementation lands. Focused verification commands: PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/release-automation-contract.spec.ts tests/integration/ci-workflow-contract.spec.ts; pnpm quality:docs-skills; node scripts/check-secrets.mjs; after a clean tree, node scripts/release/run-release-pipeline.mjs --dry-run --json --telemetry-mode off --skip-compatibility --skip-telemetry-sentry.

value.author: release-flow-subagent
value.text: release-flow-subagent findings: current baseline skip path is run-release-pipeline.mjs getLastTag/getCommitCountSince/getChangedFilesSince -> filter !.agents/pm -> readUnreleasedChangelogBody -> changelog_unreleased_empty. In committed baseline that path returns ok:true/skipped:true even with src-touching files. Current worktree already has an uncommitted minimal patch exporting isChangelogRequiredPath/buildEmptyChangelogResult and making empty changelog return ok:false + warning + exit 1 when package/source/workflow/release-script files changed. Suggested tests: unit import of buildEmptyChangelogResult for src vs docs-only; integration/temp git repo proving --json exits nonzero with source file + empty Unreleased; tracker-only remains ok:true tracker_only_changes_since_last_tag; changelog-promote empty section remains failing.

value.note: harden empty changelog release skip for source/package changes
document empty [Unreleased] release blocker for releasable commits

value.author: privacy-observability-subagent
value.text: Final privacy/observability review: no accidental literal private host/key/token leak found in tracked release/telemetry/Sentry docs/scripts. Evidence: node scripts/check-secrets.mjs => 'No credential-like secrets detected in tracked files.'; strict secret regex over tracked release/telemetry/Sentry docs/scripts only matched scripts/release/utils.mjs argv variable name 'token', not a secret value; private ops path check showed git ls-files scripts/prod => no tracked files and git check-ignore maps scripts/prod/telemetry/* to .gitignore:24. Notable tracked references are env/secret placeholders only (SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN, SENTRY_PERSONAL_ADMIN_TOKEN, NPM_TOKEN, GH_TOKEN) in docs/workflows. Current post-implementation observability verification commands to run: pnpm release:gates -- --telemetry-mode required --max-sentry-critical 10 --max-sentry-high 20 --max-telemetry-error-rate 6 --max-telemetry-missing-error-rows 0 --json; or direct node scripts/release/sentry-telemetry-gate.mjs --json --telemetry-mode required --max-critical 10 --max-high 20 --max-telemetry-error-rate 6 --max-telemetry-missing-error-rows 0; plus node scripts/check-secrets.mjs after release docs/workflow edits. For CI parity, auto-release uses telemetry_mode off by default unless workflow_dispatch overrides it, while release.yml runs Sentry issue gate with telemetry-mode off and thresholds 10/20.

value.author: codex-release-ux
value.text: Clean evidence summary: implemented loud empty-changelog release guard in scripts/release/run-release-pipeline.mjs. Empty CHANGELOG [Unreleased] still skips cleanly for tracker/docs-only changes, but source/package/release-script/workflow changes now return ok=false, include changelog_required_files, include warning release_changelog_required:source_or_package_changes_without_unreleased_entry, and exit nonzero. Passed: focused release automation spec 9/9, pnpm build, pnpm quality:docs-skills, node scripts/check-secrets.mjs, linked pm test pm-ot8r --run --progress, manual temp-project dogfood 84 workflows with isolated PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH, pm health --check-only --brief --json, and live sentry-telemetry-gate with Sentry critical=0 high=0 total=0 and telemetry finish_error_rate_pct=3.07 missing_error_rows=0.

value.note: focused behavioral regressions for empty changelog release guard

patch.value: Fixed auto daily release silent skip: empty CHANGELOG [Unreleased] now fails with actionable changelog_required_files for releasable source/package/script/workflow changes, while tracker/docs-only skips stay green. Evidence recorded in comments and linked tests passed.
